economic_notes: Band operates multiple government business enterprises and partnerships including Knucwentwecw Development Corporation, Big Sky Station Ltd (retail/fuel outlet), Skeetchestn Natural Resources Corporation, and partnerships including Painted Rock Aggregates & Contracting LLP, Skeetchestn Natural Resources LLP, Ckukutusem Utility Services LLP, Stk'emlupsemc Limited Partnership, and Skeetchestn Holdings LLP. Big Sky Station operates a retail store and fuel sales outlet on reservation land near Savona, BC.
notes: Audit is QUALIFIED on three bases: (1) CMHC social housing TCA amortized at principal reduction rate rather than useful life per PSAS; (2) PS 3280 Asset Retirement Obligations not yet assessed/implemented; (3) certain Government Business Enterprises/Partnerships financial statements not prepared under IFRS as required by PSAS. Band has 3 GBEs (Knucwentwecw Development Corporation, Big Sky Station Ltd., Skeetchestn Natural Resources Corporation) and 5 government partnerships accounted for under modified equity method. Investments in partnerships total $45.8M and GBEs total $4.25M. Smith/Curtis Specific Claim Settlement trust fund held with Royal Trust. Total government transfers calculated as ISC $6,177,473 + CMHC $366,554 + BC First Nations Gaming $482,404 + FNESC $682,581 + FNHA $607,233 + First Nations and Inuit Child Care $170,124 + New Relationship Trust $260,000 + Province of BC $949,523 + Qwemtsin Health Society $332,734 + Shuswap Nation Tribal Council $534,250 = $10,563,876 (approximate; Wellness $810,831 and expenses_education split between School $1,456,899 and Education $1,302,506). OSR includes contract revenue, GBE/partnership income, interest, leases, taxation, trust funds. Expenses_education combines School ($1,456,899) and Education ($1,302,506). Expenses_housing combines Housing ($1,471,750) and Social Housing ($257,974). Expenses_infrastructure mapped to Public Works. Schedule of remuneration not included in provided text.
